subject: Create helm chart for ICN/SDEWAN controllers
commit_message:
Create helm chart for ICN/SDEWAN controllers

Create helm chart for sdewan-controller in KUD

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1104
Signed-off-by: Yao Le <le.yao@intel.com>

Patch Set 3:

@ritu, please help review this patch

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

Move the helm chart under kud directory.

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> 
> Move the helm chart under kud directory.

Hi, you mean that we should move the whole helm chart folders under KUD directory? (include onap4k8s servicemesh helm files?)
/deployments/
-->helm/
---->controllers
---->onap4k8s
---->servicemesh
---->cnf

or only my controller helm chart?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> 
> Move the helm chart under kud directory.

The other Helm charts in this directory are related to installing onap4k8s/k8splugin. Some other helm charts here are supposed to work with k8splugin. Since the source code for the SDWAN application is not in this repo this Helm chart is related to use case for k8splugin. Only this chart needs to be moved.
Patch Set 4: Patch Set 3 was rebased

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> > Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > Move the helm chart under kud directory.
> 
> The other Helm charts in this directory are related to installing onap4k8s/k8splugin. Some other helm charts here are supposed to work with k8splugin. Since the source code for the SDWAN application is not in this repo this Helm chart is related to use case for k8splugin. Only this chart needs to be moved.

Got it! And I move the controllers to /k8s/kud/deployment_infra/helm.
